title: Plain & Precious
description: Improves certain parts of the existing textures while still keeping it true to Vanilla Minecraft!
body:
# Plain & Precious

**A resource pack that improves certain aspects of Vanilla Minecraft, while staying true to its Plain & Precious!**
**This pack contains many additions like new item and block textures, fluid animations, even neat quality of life improvements, and more!**

#
